source_metadata.title: 2026/02/18 - GA [Part 1]

Wednesday 18 February 2026 | Governance and Administration Committee

- Sophie Siers, Chair of Joint Committee
- Shane Briggs, Director of Hawkes Bay Emergency Management, and Statutory role of Group Controller
